title: aquilegia haenkeana subsp. subalpina
intro: Aquilegia haenkeana subsp. subalpina, also known as the alpine columbine, is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family Ranunculaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The alpine columbine is believed to have several health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
